name: Buttercup Squash
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim stems off squash and cut each into quarters using a cleaver or large chef's knife.
If necessary, hit the back of the knife with a mallet to force it through the squash.
2. Scrape away seeds.
3. In a large kettle, bring 2 quarts of water to boil.
4. Add squash sections and cook until tender, 10 to 15 minutes.
5. Remove from water and sprinkle with a little ground mace and pepper.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE CAL: 40; CHO: 0mg; PRO: 1g; SOD: 2mg; FAT: 0g.
